projects.title: Job Copilot — AI-Powered Job Intelligence & Auto-Application Platform
projects.description: Built a full-stack job intelligence platform that collects, deduplicates, scores, and analyzes job postings from multiple sources (Greenhouse, Lever, Remotive, RemoteJobs.io, USAJobs). The platform generates tailored resumes and cover letters per job using Claude Sonnet, with experience bullets grouped by role, scored for relevance against job requirements, and rewritten to be impact-first. Implemented a Playwright-based automated application engine that fills and submits Greenhouse and Lever application forms — including custom question handling via Claude — with CAPTCHA detection, screenshot audit trails, and per-attempt status tracking. Deployed as a Dockerized FastAPI app with a Jinja2 UI, SQLAlchemy ORM, MySQL backend, and Alembic migrations.
projects.outcome: End-to-end pipeline from job discovery to automated submission — one button fires a tailored resume, cover letter, and a Playwright-driven application against real job boards. Claude handles custom form questions, screenshots capture every submission for audit, and job status updates automatically on success.

projects.title: Cloud-Hosted Portfolio Site — IaC on GCP (gorillac.net)
projects.description: Designed and deployed a production-grade personal portfolio site on GCP with all infrastructure defined as code in Terraform. Resources provisioned include: a GCS bucket with versioning and static website hosting, a Cloud CDN-backed backend bucket for edge caching, a globally reserved static IP, path-based URL map routing (serving static assets from GCS while routing /api/contact to a Cloud Run backend service), a Google-managed SSL certificate covering gorillac.net and www.gorillac.net, HTTPS and HTTP target proxies, and global forwarding rules on ports 80 and 443 with automatic HTTP-to-HTTPS redirect. All assets are uploaded and managed as Terraform resources with correct MIME types and IAM public read access.
projects.outcome: Fully reproducible, zero-click infrastructure — a single `terraform apply` provisions and wires the entire stack. Live at gorillac.net with sub-second global load times via CDN edge caching.

projects.title: Enterprise Application Security — Pasco County BOCC
projects.description: Architected secure enterprise web applications serving 5,000+ county users. Implemented JWT-based authentication and role-based access control (RBAC) to harden application perimeter.
projects.outcome: 35% reduction in unauthorized access exposure risk; 25–30% decrease in development lifecycle timelines.

projects.title: Cloud Security & Compliance Engineering — Hillsborough County BOCC
projects.description: Engineered secure workloads across Azure and GCP environments. Conducted penetration testing and vulnerability assessments. Integrated automated SAST/DAST scanning into CI/CD pipelines.
projects.outcome: 20%+ reduction in manual detection effort; measurable decrease in OWASP Top 10 exposure across application environments.

projects.title: Vulnerability Remediation Workflows — Rapid7
projects.description: Partnered with engineering teams to remediate backend vulnerabilities across .NET and Python environments. Designed structured remediation workflows and supported deployment of security monitoring across hybrid infrastructure.
projects.outcome: 20%+ reduction in vulnerability resolution timelines through workflow standardization.

projects.title: Vulnerability Analysis Blog
projects.description: A hands-on technical blog series covering practical vulnerability analysis and security testing workflows for DevSecOps practitioners. Posts cover: (1) structured vulnerability management using Tenable — scanning, triage, and business-context-driven prioritization; (2) integrating the OWASP Top 10 (2021) into analysis workflows using OWASP ZAP, Burp Suite, Nessus, and Qualys to map findings and communicate risk; (3) a full seven-stage penetration testing workflow with Metasploit — from reconnaissance through post-exploitation and reporting.
projects.outcome: Publicly documented, end-to-end security research demonstrating hands-on expertise in vulnerability identification, exploitation validation, risk prioritization, and remediation — moving beyond theoretical knowledge into real-world threat confirmation.

projects.title: Healthcare Infrastructure Hardening — Florida Dept. of Health
projects.description: Maintained HIPAA-aligned critical infrastructure. Implemented firewall policies, VLAN segmentation, and endpoint hardening. Managed patch governance and SQL Server optimization.
projects.outcome: Improved network security posture and system stability across mission-critical healthcare environments.
